features: BIC Razors for Women; These pretty and practical triple-blade disposable razors put the fun in shaving with unique flower design handles. Holiday essentials for women wherever the location.
Triple Bladed Shaver for Women; Each razer has 3 high-quality stainless steel razor blades, so expect a smooth close shave. The perfect bikini razor and ladies shavers for legs and armpits.
Ladies Razors Sensitive Skin; The razor heads on this BIC razors women range product have a twin lubricating strip enriched with Vitamin E for an easy glide. The perfect intimate shavers for women.
Womens Razor Made Pretty; Make your shave and toiletries even prettier with lovely flower engraved handles. Womens razors for shaving designed purposefully by the BIC razor team.
Ergonomic Lady Shavers for Women; Our ladies razor has a wide curved handle, ergonomically designed to snugly fit in your hand for great grip and control while manual shaving.
description: Product Description Add a touch of colour and fun to your routine with BIC Soleil Razors Women - Colour Collection Triple Blade Disposable Women’s Razors with Engraved Flower Handles - Pack of 4. Pretty enough for your bathroom shelf and practical enough for everyday use, these women's razors are perfect travel essentials, gym bag must-haves and bathroom staples. Each shaving razor in this pack features three high-quality stainless steel razor blades women can rely on for a close, even shave. Whether you’re shaving legs, underarms or using it as a bikini lady shaver, the triple-blade design removes hair efficiently for soft, smooth skin with minimal effort. It’s a versatile womens shaver that fits easily into your regular body-care routine. For added comfort, the head includes a twin lubricating strip enriched with Vitamin E to help the blades glide smoothly over the skin. That makes each razor for women a great choice for more delicate areas and an excellent option if you’re looking for lady razors for women suitable for sensitive skin. Simple and effective, they’re ideal for anyone who prefers straightforward disposable women shaver solutions without cartridge fuss. The Colour Collection really shines in the handle design. Every women razor has a sturdy, ergonomically shaped handle engraved with pretty flower motifs, adding a bright, feminine twist to your toiletries. Whether in your bathroom, overnight bag or suitcase, these razor women designs bring a little extra joy to your shave. Each triple-blade head delivers clean results with the precision you’d expect from a premium razer blade style finish. With 4 triple blade disposable razors women can count on, the BIC Soleil Colour Collection offers convenience, quality and style in one neat pack. Keep a women's razor at home, pop one in your travel pouch, and enjoy confident, comfortable shaving every time you reach for this trusted razor for women. Directions Prepare your skin, apply shaving cream or gel, shave thoroughly using the technique recommended for different parts of the body, clean and replace the blade cartridge, and store the razor properly.
